CustomField.description: Serialized snapshot of key variable values at the time of fault. Format is pipe-delimited name:value pairs (e.g. "ReviewType:CE|RiskScore:73|Tier:Moderate|Step:Update_RiskFields"). Populated by the calling flow before it invokes NEPA_Error_Logger as inp_ErrorContext. Enables post-mortem diagnosis without needing to reproduce the failure.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Variable state snapshot at the time of failure, populated automatically by the faulted flow.
CustomField.label: Error Context
